<!-- indicator: fig-five-lead-death -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-five-lead-death
#| fig-cap: 'Top Five Leading Causes of Death, by Count and Age-Adjusted Rate per 100,000 Population, 2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Top Five Leading Causes of Death, by Count and Age-Adjusted Rate per 100,000 Population, 2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-five-lead-death", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("fig-five-lead-death", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
